notableEvents.label: Jonah Heim GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jonah Heim grounds into a double play, pitcher Landen Roupp to shortstop Willy Adames to first baseman Bryce Eldridge. Tyler Soderstrom out at 2nd. Jonah Heim out at 1st.
